title: UAC Bypass via fodhelper, eventvwr, or sdclt
description: Detects UAC bypass techniques using auto-elevated Windows binaries: fodhelper.exe, eventvwr.exe, and sdclt.exe. These binaries read registry keys that attackers pre-populate with malicious commands, executing them with high integrity without a UAC prompt. Commonly used in Cobalt Strike and metasploit post-exploitation.
falsepositives: Rare: legitimate administrative tools spawning from these binaries
